logicalScenes.description: A toasted baguette edge drags through thick white feta and ruby strawberry salsa, lifting a messy creamy bite.
logicalScenes.note: Texture-first opening; pay off the final dish immediately without explaining the recipe.
logicalScenes.textureCue: crunchy toast, thick feta smear, glossy strawberry chunks clinging to the bread

logicalScenes.description: The lifted bite pauses close to camera: feta peaks, red fruit cubes, green herbs, and chile gloss are visible.
logicalScenes.note: Scene 2 clarifies scene 1 by showing what the creamy red bite contains.
logicalScenes.textureCue: soft white peaks, wet strawberry surfaces, tiny herbs stuck in cream

logicalScenes.description: A shallow bowl sits on the terrazzo island with a white whipped feta spiral and red salsa mound, bread nearby.
logicalScenes.note: Fast context reset; match the creator-provided desired final visual.
logicalScenes.textureCue: white swirl, ruby mound, toasted edges

logicalScenes.description: A second tiny drag leaves a red-white smear trail in the feta bowl.
logicalScenes.note: Immediate replayable food-porn smear before jumping back to prep.
logicalScenes.textureCue: thick cream ridge collapsing into berry juice

logicalScenes.description: A chef knife slices glossy strawberries into small 0.8-1.2 cm diced pieces.
logicalScenes.note: Scale lock: diced pieces, not halves or puree.
logicalScenes.textureCue: wet cut strawberry faces, seeds catching light

logicalScenes.description: A handful of diced strawberries tumbles into a clear bowl in a ruby pile.
logicalScenes.note: Two cups implied by a generous bowl, not a few tokens.
logicalScenes.textureCue: juicy cubes bouncing and glistening

logicalScenes.description: Fine chopped basil and cilantro rain over the strawberries as green flecks stick to juice.
logicalScenes.note: Herbs stay visible as leaves, not dust.
logicalScenes.textureCue: green leafy confetti on wet red fruit

logicalScenes.description: Tiny deseeded jalapeno cubes slide from a knife edge into the bowl.
logicalScenes.note: Jalapeno is diced and seeded, adding sensual heat without large rings.
logicalScenes.textureCue: bright green chile cubes against scarlet fruit

logicalScenes.description: Lime juice squeezes over the fruit in bright droplets.
logicalScenes.note: Citrus creates the wet gloss that sells the salsa.
logicalScenes.textureCue: clear droplets bursting on berry skin

logicalScenes.description: Chili powder falls in a red-brown veil over the glossy fruit.
logicalScenes.note: The spice fall is the sensual heat cue.
logicalScenes.textureCue: dry red powder blooming against wet ruby cubes

logicalScenes.description: A spoon folds the salsa once, keeping distinct diced fruit and herbs.
logicalScenes.note: Single fold only; do not mash.
logicalScenes.textureCue: chunky spoonable salsa, glossy loose juices

logicalScenes.description: The food processor sits on the island; feta chunks, softened cream cheese, and honey wait nearby.
logicalScenes.note: Utility context kept brief before texture payoff.
logicalScenes.textureCue: crumbly white cheese, soft cream cheese block, amber honey

logicalScenes.description: Feta chunks crumble into the processor bowl.
logicalScenes.note: Show starting texture before transformation.
logicalScenes.textureCue: dry salty white crumbles

logicalScenes.description: Soft cream cheese drops in thick white slabs over the feta.
logicalScenes.note: Cream cheese should read as dense and softened.
logicalScenes.textureCue: smooth dense white slabs against crumbly feta

logicalScenes.description: Honey ribbons into the processor bowl in a slow amber thread.
logicalScenes.note: A sensual sticky contrast before whipping.
logicalScenes.textureCue: viscous amber honey stretching over white cheese

logicalScenes.description: The processor blitzes: crumbly dairy turns into a thick white vortex.
logicalScenes.note: Hard cut inside/overhead view; no long blending process.
logicalScenes.textureCue: white vortex smoothing from grainy to satin

logicalScenes.description: A spoon lifts smooth whipped feta from the processor; it holds soft peaks.
logicalScenes.note: Transformation proof: fluffy and smooth, not liquid.
logicalScenes.textureCue: satiny white cream with soft peaks and glossy ridges

logicalScenes.description: A shallow bowl is centered on the island, ready for the whipped feta.
logicalScenes.note: Sets the plating geometry: shallow bowl, not tall cup.
logicalScenes.textureCue: clean shallow bowl on light terrazzo

logicalScenes.description: A thick spoonful of whipped feta drops into the bowl with a soft mound.
logicalScenes.note: Show viscosity before spreading.
logicalScenes.textureCue: dense white mound that slumps slowly but holds shape

logicalScenes.description: The spoon presses and pulls the feta into a broad white spiral.
logicalScenes.note: One clear spiral action, no repeated messy stirring.
logicalScenes.textureCue: satiny ridges and valleys, thick spoon trails

logicalScenes.description: A final spoon turn leaves a glossy central hollow ready for salsa.
logicalScenes.note: The hollow explains where the red salsa will land.
logicalScenes.textureCue: white ridged crater with shiny edges

logicalScenes.description: The rested strawberry salsa glistens in its bowl, chunky and jewel-like.
logicalScenes.note: Continuity: this is the same diced salsa from segment 02.
logicalScenes.textureCue: ruby cubes, green herbs, red spice, loose lime-chile juice

logicalScenes.description: A spoon lifts a generous mound of salsa; juice drips back in slow red droplets.
logicalScenes.note: Food-porn drip beat before topping.
logicalScenes.textureCue: chunky fruit mound with sticky red-lime drip

logicalScenes.description: The salsa lands in the feta hollow as a generous central ruby mound.
logicalScenes.note: Plating quantity lock: central mound covers roughly one third of the feta surface, not a tiny garnish and not full coverage.
logicalScenes.textureCue: red fruit jewels settling into white cream ridges

logicalScenes.description: A little red juice creeps down one feta ridge while herb flecks cling to the white swirl.
logicalScenes.note: Micro payoff for the red-white contrast.
logicalScenes.textureCue: thin ruby juice streak on thick white ridge

logicalScenes.description: The plated bowl matches the desired final visual with toasted baguette and chips close by.
logicalScenes.note: Final visual reference lock: shallow bowl, whipped feta base, red salsa top, bread/chips as dippers.
logicalScenes.textureCue: white swirl, red fruit mound, golden toast

logicalScenes.description: Toasted baguette slices fan beside the bowl, their blistered golden edges visible.
logicalScenes.note: Dipper quantity: 5-7 slices visible, not a single crumb.
logicalScenes.textureCue: crisp browned bread surface, airy holes

logicalScenes.description: A hand selects one baguette slice and taps it against the bowl edge.
logicalScenes.note: Visible hand only as support for the food action.
logicalScenes.textureCue: crisp toast edge, white bowl rim

logicalScenes.description: The toast cuts into the feta swirl and pushes through the salsa mound.
logicalScenes.note: One decisive scoop motion; show contact and resistance.
logicalScenes.textureCue: thick feta buckling, red salsa dragging, toast crust scraping

logicalScenes.description: The toast lifts loaded with feta, strawberries, herbs, and chili-lime shine.
logicalScenes.note: Cling lock: toppings stay attached to the toast.
logicalScenes.textureCue: soft white peaks and ruby cubes hanging from crunchy bread

logicalScenes.description: A slow red-white smear remains in the bowl where the bread passed.
logicalScenes.note: Sensual aftermath shot.
logicalScenes.textureCue: red juice streaks, white feta trough, herb flecks

logicalScenes.description: Luma appears behind the island, presenting the finished bowl with a satisfied expression.
logicalScenes.note: End with Licorn kitchen context and character visible.
logicalScenes.textureCue: finished red-white dip in foreground

logicalScenes.description: Another loaded chip or baguette corner dips into the red-white swirl.
logicalScenes.note: Final texture repeat before expression.
logicalScenes.textureCue: crisp dipper, thick feta, juicy berry mound

logicalScenes.description: A close view of the finished surface: white whipped ridges, red salsa, green herbs, and chili specks.
logicalScenes.note: Use desired final image as color and composition target.
logicalScenes.textureCue: glossy red fruit against satin white feta

logicalScenes.description: Luma leans in with a pleased look while the finished bowl and toasted bread stay foregrounded.
logicalScenes.note: Character is supportive; food remains the hero.
logicalScenes.textureCue: finished dip stays sharp in foreground

logicalScenes.description: Final lingering hero close-up of the strawberry salsa mound sinking into the whipped feta swirl.
logicalScenes.note: End on the food-porn surface, no text on screen.
logicalScenes.textureCue: ruby juices pooling in thick white spiral
